mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TAB_PURCHASE_ITEM (S_ID, S_TENANT_ID, S_PURCHASE_ID, S_GOODS_ID, I_QTY_BASE, S_INPUT_UNIT, I_INPUT_QTY, I_PRICE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER) VALUES (#{sId}, #{sTenantId}, #{sPurchaseId}, #{sGoodsId}, #{iQtyBase}, #{sInputUnit}, #{iInputQty}, #{iPrice}, #{dtCreateTime}, #{dtUpdateTime}, #{sCreateUser}, #{sUpdateUser})
mapper.select: SELECT S_ID, S_PURCHASE_ID, S_GOODS_ID, I_QTY_BASE, S_INPUT_UNIT, I_INPUT_QTY, I_PRICE, DT_CREATE_TIME, DT_UPDATE_TIME, S_CREATE_USER, S_UPDATE_USER FROM TAB_PURCHASE_ITEM WHERE S_PURCHASE_ID = #{purchaseId}
